rows.label: tlk46310171_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Marveni-sama is in a rite.
No one may interfere.

rows.label: tlk46310171_03_msg0002
rows.name:
I can't give details,
but you'll know soon.
It's a rite to bring peace.

rows.label: tlk46310171_03_msg0003
rows.name:
One day you'll see
Acedia's greatness
and bow your heads.
